info.name: 01-Case2ClawbackAccounting
info.description: Synchronous refund, Stripe answers immediately. Refunds are raised PER-COMPONENT (refundComponents=[{RIDE_FARE, rfN}]) so the per-component ledger-driven flow runs. Success Case-2 (deductFromDriver=true): raise -> approve -> asserts BAP per-component legs (RideFareRefund + RideFareRefundVAT, OwnerExpense->BuyerControl) SETTLED summing to rf1 plus a SETTLED zero-out reversal per leg (BuyerControl->OwnerExpense, reversal_of set) so BAP nets to zero; BPP Case-2 legs (RideFareRefund + RideFareRefundVAT on OwnerLiability->BuyerExternal + RideFareRefundCommission slice on SellerExpense->BuyerExternal) SETTLED summing to rf1; both negative Refund invoices (BAP carries reference_invoice_number=parent ride invoice) + the negative Commission refund invoice (invoice_type='Commission', reference_id=refundRequestId) + PDFs.

exec: // Dynamic refund amounts derived from the real ride's charged amount T (self-captured in THIS run's gate, NOT carried from 00).
// rf1 = 0.5*cap (primary), rf2 = 0.25*cap (secondary partial), rf3 = 0.5*cap. Sized off the REAL RIDE_FARE
// component cap (rideFareCap, captured from fare_breakup_info) — NOT off T — so rf1 never spuriously trips
// the per-component cap on a ride with fees/toll/parking. Falls back to T until the gate sets rideFareCap.

item.name: Capture RIDE_FARE component cap (SQL fare_breakup_info — refund cap source)

exec: // RIDE_FARE cap = sum of these tags (= li.rideFare + li.gstAmount, RidePayment.hs:841). TOLL/PARKING analogous (same pattern for tollCap/parkingCap).
function _sum(arr, tags){ return (arr||[]).filter(function(b){ return tags.indexOf(b.description) >= 0; }).reduce(function(a,b){ return a + Number(b.amount||0); }, 0); }
if (rows && rows.length) { try { bk = JSON.parse(rows[0].fare_breakups || '[]'); } catch(e) { bk = []; } }
console.log('Gate: rideFareCap='+rfCap+' tollCap='+tollCap+' parkingCap='+parkCap+' (from fare_breakup_info; refund amounts fall back to T if rideFareCap=0)');
pm.test('RIDE_FARE component cap captured from fare_breakup_info', function(){ pm.expect(rfCap, 'zero RIDE_FARE cap — stale fixture, re-run 00').to.be.above(0); });

item.name: Assert BAP ledger SETTLED + zero-out (OwnerExpense->BuyerControl)

exec: // Per-component refund refTypes (the reset wipes the original ride-payment legs, but we still scope so each assert passes for the RIGHT reason).
// Zero-out model: raise legs (reversal_of NULL) settle in place; success ALSO posts a kernel reversal per leg
// (reversal_of=<raise leg id>, direction swapped, same refType) so BAP nets to zero. Sums use raise legs ONLY.
console.log('  ↳ expected: BAP raise legs (RideFareRefund + RideFareRefundVAT) SUM to rf1 =', pm.environment.get('rf1'), '+ a SETTLED zero-out reversal per leg');

try { var _rows = (_resp.rows) || []; console.log('  ↳ DB rows:', JSON.stringify(_rows.map(function(x){ return {st:x.status, amt:x.amount, type:x.reference_type, rev:!!x.reversal_of}; }))); } catch(e) {}
pm.test('BAP refund ledger has SETTLED per-component raise legs', function () {
pm.expect(_settled2.length, 'expected >=1 SETTLED refund raise leg (OwnerExpense->BuyerControl; roles verified in the next step)').to.be.above(0);
// BAP posts PER-COMPONENT raise legs (RideFareRefund + RideFareRefundVAT) that SUM to the gross refund rf1 - no single gross 'RideRefund' leg.
pm.test('BAP per-component refund legs use the per-component refTypes', function () {
_settled2.forEach(function (r) { pm.expect(_newRefTypes, 'unexpected refType ' + r.reference_type + ' (legacy RideRefund means refundComponents was not sent)').to.include(r.reference_type); });
pm.test('BAP per-component raise legs SUM to rf1 (gross; reversal legs excluded)', function () {
pm.test('BAP zero-out: every settled raise leg has a SETTLED same-amount reversal; mirrors SUM to rf1', function () {
pm.expect(_m, 'raise leg ' + r.id + ' (' + r.reference_type + ') has no reversal — BAP does not net to zero').to.exist;
pm.expect(_m.status, 'reversal of ' + r.reference_type + ' must be SETTLED').to.eql('SETTLED');
pm.expect(Number(_m.amount), 'reversal amount must equal its raise leg').to.be.closeTo(Number(r.amount), 0.001);
pm.expect(_msum, 'zero-out reversals must also sum to rf1').to.be.closeTo(_R, 0.011);

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody()} }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(_ok(rows) || n<=0){ _assert(rows); } else { setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } }); }

item.name: Assert BAP refund leg ACCOUNT ROLES (OwnerExpense->BuyerControl + zero-out mirror)

exec: // BAP-side mirror of the BPP role check: the refType+sum asserts above do NOT verify the account ROLES.
// Zero-out model: the raise posts OwnerExpense(from) -> BuyerControl(to) per component (RidePayment.createRefundRaisedLedger);
// createRefundSucceededLedger settles them AND posts a kernel reversal per leg (reversal_of set, direction swapped:
// BuyerControl -> OwnerExpense) so BAP nets to zero. No role column exists -> resolve from_account_id/to_account_id
// against atlas_app.finance_account. On the BAP ctx.counterpartyType=RIDER, so (FinanceM.roleToInput):
// OwnerExpense = Expense + RIDER; BuyerControl = Control + BUYER.

refLegs.forEach(function(l){ if(l.from_account_id && ids.indexOf(l.from_account_id)<0) ids.push(l.from_account_id); if(l.to_account_id && ids.indexOf(l.to_account_id)<0) ids.push(l.to_account_id); });
pm.test('BAP role check: settled BAP refund legs present', function(){ pm.expect(ids.length, 'no settled BAP refund legs with account ids to role-check').to.be.above(0); });
pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw:_acctBody(ids)} }, function(err,res){

try { console.log('  ↳ BAP leg roles:', JSON.stringify(refLegs.map(function(l){ var f=amap[l.from_account_id]||{}, t=amap[l.to_account_id]||{}; return {type:l.reference_type, rev:!!l.reversal_of, from_t:f.t, from_c:f.c, to_t:t.t, to_c:t.c}; }))); } catch(e){}
pm.test('BAP raise legs debit OwnerExpense (Expense + RIDER)', function(){
pm.expect(raiseLegs.length, 'expected >=1 settled BAP refund raise leg').to.be.above(0);

raiseLegs.forEach(function(l){ var a=amap[l.from_account_id]||{}; pm.expect(a.t, 'from-leg '+l.reference_type+' account_type (OwnerExpense)').to.eql('Expense'); pm.expect(a.c, 'from-leg '+l.reference_type+' counterparty_type (OwnerExpense=RIDER)').to.eql('RIDER'); });
pm.test('BAP raise legs credit BuyerControl (Control + BUYER)', function(){

raiseLegs.forEach(function(l){ var a=amap[l.to_account_id]||{}; pm.expect(a.t, 'to-leg '+l.reference_type+' account_type (BuyerControl)').to.eql('Control'); pm.expect(a.c, 'to-leg '+l.reference_type+' counterparty_type (BuyerControl=BUYER)').to.eql('BUYER'); });
pm.test('BAP zero-out mirrors run BuyerControl -> OwnerExpense (roles swapped)', function(){
pm.expect(f.t, 'mirror from-leg '+l.reference_type+' account_type (BuyerControl)').to.eql('Control'); pm.expect(f.c, 'mirror from-leg counterparty (BUYER)').to.eql('BUYER');
pm.expect(t.t, 'mirror to-leg '+l.reference_type+' account_type (OwnerExpense)').to.eql('Expense'); pm.expect(t.c, 'mirror to-leg counterparty (RIDER)').to.eql('RIDER');

item.name: Assert BPP ledger SETTLED (OwnerLiability(driver) + SellerExpense(commission slice))

exec: function _ok(rows){ var s=rows.filter(function(r){return r.status==='SETTLED' && _isRefund(r);}); if(!s.length) return false; var sum=s.reduce(function(a,r){return a+Number(r.amount);},0); return sum >= Number(pm.environment.get('rf1')) - 0.02; }

console.log('  ↳ expected (Case-2): RideFareRefund+RideFareRefundVAT (OwnerLiability) + RideFareRefundCommission slice (SellerExpense); legs SUM to rf1 | C='+pm.environment.get('bpp_commission')+' R='+pm.environment.get('rf1')+' T='+pm.environment.get('txn_amount'));
try { var _rows = (_resp.rows) || []; console.log('  ↳ DB rows:', JSON.stringify(_rows.map(function(x){ return {st:x.status, amt:x.amount, type:x.reference_type}; }))); } catch(e) {}
// Case-2 ride-fare refund posts PER-COMPONENT legs, NOT legacy DriverShare/CommissionShare:
//   RideFareRefund (driver base = fareAmount - commissionSlice) + RideFareRefundVAT (driver vat) on OwnerLiability->BuyerExternal (bug-fixed role; reduces payout)
//   commissionSlice = round2(C * refundedRideFare / rideFareComponentTotal). All legs SUM to gross rf1.
pm.test('BPP refund ledger Case-2 split, SETTLED', function () {

pm.expect(_settled2.length, 'BPP refund ledger empty -> the BAP->BPP refundLedger call did not fire (config-sync wires driver_offer_base_url/api_key; ensure both apps are up + restarted after sync), OR refundComponents was not sent.').to.be.above(0);
pm.test('Case-2 BPP legs use per-component refTypes (DriverShare/CommissionShare gone)', function () {
_settled2.forEach(function (r) { pm.expect(_newRefTypes, 'unexpected refType ' + r.reference_type + ' (legacy means refundComponents was not sent)').to.include(r.reference_type); });
pm.test('Case-2 BPP refund legs SUM to rf1', function () {
// Case-2 with commission>0 must post the SellerExpense commission slice leg.
pm.test('Case-2 posts a RideFareRefundCommission slice when commission>0', function () {
pm.expect(_C, 'commission>0 (00 gates it); Case-2 commission asserts must not be vacuous').to.be.above(0);
pm.expect(_comm.length, 'expected a SETTLED RideFareRefundCommission leg in Case-2 (commission>0)').to.be.above(0);

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody()} }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(_ok(rows) || n<=0){ _assert(rows); } else { setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } }); }

item.name: Assert BPP refund leg ACCOUNT ROLES (Case-2: driver OwnerLiability + platform SellerExpense)

exec: // The TRUE Case-1/Case-2 discriminator is the account ROLE, not reference_type (no role column exists).
// Resolve each leg's from_account_id -> finance_account (account_type + counterparty_type). Case-2: driver legs
// debit OwnerLiability = Liability + DRIVER/FLEET_OWNER (reduces payout); the commission slice debits
// SellerExpense = Expense + SELLER. Roles per FinanceM.roleToInput / getOrCreateAccount.
var ids = refLegs.map(function(l){ return l.from_account_id; }).filter(function(x){ return !!x; });

pm.test('Case-2 role check: settled BPP refund legs present', function(){ pm.expect(ids.length, 'no settled BPP refund legs with from_account_id to role-check (BPP refundLedger may not have fired)').to.be.above(0); });
pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw:_acctBody(ids)} }, function(err,res){
try { console.log('  ↳ BPP leg roles:', JSON.stringify(refLegs.map(function(l){ var a=amap[l.from_account_id]||{}; return {type:l.reference_type, from_t:a.t, from_c:a.c}; }))); } catch(e){}
pm.test('Case-2: driver legs debit OwnerLiability (Liability + DRIVER/FLEET_OWNER) -> payout reduced', function(){

driverLegs.forEach(function(l){ var a=amap[l.from_account_id]||{}; pm.expect(a.t, 'driver leg '+l.reference_type+' account_type').to.eql('Liability'); pm.expect(['DRIVER','FLEET_OWNER'], 'driver leg '+l.reference_type+' counterparty_type').to.include(a.c); });
pm.test('Case-2: commission slice debits SellerExpense (Expense + SELLER) -> platform bears it', function(){
pm.expect(_C, 'commission>0 (00 gates it); Case-2 commission asserts must not be vacuous').to.be.above(0);
pm.expect(commLegs.length, 'expected a settled RideFareRefundCommission leg when commission>0').to.be.above(0);

commLegs.forEach(function(l){ var a=amap[l.from_account_id]||{}; pm.expect(a.t, 'commission leg account_type').to.eql('Expense'); pm.expect(a.c, 'commission leg counterparty_type').to.eql('SELLER'); });
pm.test('Case-2: driver bears (refund − commission), platform bears the commission slice (payout reduction)', function(){
var driverSum = refLegs.filter(function(l){ return _DRIVER_RT.indexOf(l.reference_type)>=0; }).reduce(function(a,l){ return a+Number(l.amount); }, 0);
var commSum = refLegs.filter(function(l){ return l.reference_type==='RideFareRefundCommission'; }).reduce(function(a,l){ return a+Number(l.amount); }, 0);
pm.expect(driverSum + commSum, 'driver clawback + platform commission = gross refund rf1').to.be.closeTo(R, 0.012);

if (_C > 0) { pm.expect(commSum, 'platform commission slice > 0 when commission>0').to.be.above(0); pm.expect(driverSum, 'driver payout reduction = rf1 - commission slice').to.be.closeTo(R - commSum, 0.012); } else { pm.expect(driverSum, 'no commission -> driver bears the full refund').to.be.closeTo(R, 0.012); }

item.name: Assert BAP refund invoice PER-COMPONENT line items

exec: // per-component: the BAP Refund invoice must itemize the refund PER COMPONENT (a negative Fare line + a
// negative inline Tax line — RidePayment.mkRefundLineItems), NOT one lumped line. line_items is a jsonb
// column on finance_invoice (Beam 'lineItems' -> SQL 'line_items'); the mock SQL API returns it as a JSON
// unitPrice, lineTotal (negative; HighPrecMoney -> JSON number), groupId 'g-refund-ridefare'}.
function _parseLI(v){ if(v==null) return []; if(Array.isArray(v)) return v; try{ return JSON.parse(v); }catch(e){ return []; } }
function _dtyp(li){ var d=li.descriptionType||li.description_type; return (d && typeof d==='object') ? d.tag : d; }
try { console.log('  ↳ BAP refund invoice line_items:', JSON.stringify(li)); } catch(e){}
pm.test('BAP refund invoice carries PER-COMPONENT line items (>=2: a Fare + a Tax), not one lumped line', function(){
pm.expect(refundInv.length, 'expected a Paid Refund invoice (prerequisite for the refund-invoice checks)').to.be.above(0);
pm.expect(li.length, 'expected >=2 per-component line items (Fare + Tax), got: '+JSON.stringify(li)).to.be.above(1);
